quick-perf-springboot-junit5/src/main/ja.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
quick-perf-springboot-junit5/src/main/ja.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and thus unavailable in Spring Boot 3 / JDK 21 environments), causing a compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist.

spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate persistence annotations from the legacy javax.persistence namespace to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/main/java/.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / JDK 21 context), causing ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors if the old imports are used.

spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/main/java/.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x (which requires Java 17+), causing a compile error 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate persistence API imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence.EntityManager class not found on classpath in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x).

spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate transaction API imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.transaction.Transactional class not found on classpath in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x).

spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/test/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3/JDK 21), causing compile errors.

spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Data JPA method getById with getReferenceById.
spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/test/java/.why_exists: getById was removed in Spring Data JPA 3.0 (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors.

spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
spring-boot-n.plus.1.test/src/test/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3, causing ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.
